headline: Big Short Legend Steve Eisman Sides With Michael Burry On GameStop's $56 Billion eBay Bid: 'The Debt Is The Problem'
summary: Steve Eisman says eBay will "of course" reject GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid. Polymarket traders agree, pricing the deal at just 22%.
